goals: 報名活動 / 取消報名活動
管理員可建立、管理活動並查看報名狀況

narrative.summary: 從入口以訪客身分導向活動列表頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.Entry.Init 觸發 continueAsGuest，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: public entry loads successfully
guest navigation state is active
My Activities or Admin Panel links are not visible before authentication

narrative.summary: 從入口導向登入流程
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.Entry.Init 觸發 chooseLogin，導航到 /auth 並進入 page.AuthPage.Init。

validations.description: auth onboarding route loads successfully
email and password inputs are visible
no token or session is created before form submission

narrative.summary: 從入口導向註冊流程
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.Entry.Init 觸發 chooseRegister，導航到 /auth 並進入 page.AuthPage.Init。

validations.description: auth onboarding route loads successfully
registration entry is available from the same authentication flow
no member or admin identity is established before submission

narrative.summary: Entry 與 AuthPage 存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_auth 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 ActivityListPage 存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_activity_list 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 ActivityDetailPage 存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_activity_detail 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 MyActivitiesPage 存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_my_activities 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 AdminPanelPage 存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_admin_panel 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 AuthFeature 存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 feature_auth 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 RegistrationFeature 存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 feature_registration 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 ActivityManagementFeature 存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 feature_activity_management 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 RegistrationListFeature 存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 feature_registration_list 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: 顯示認證表單
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.AuthPage.Init 觸發 showAuthForm，讓頁面進入 page.AuthPage.Ready 並顯示登入與註冊表單。

validations.description: authentication UI renders email and password inputs
submit control is available
no loading indicator is shown before submit

narrative.summary: 從認證頁送出登入
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.AuthPage.Ready 觸發 submitLogin，導航到 AuthFeature 並進入 feature.AuthFeature.Init。

validations.description: login request is sent exactly once per submit action
loading state is shown during the request
return target is preserved when login came from a protected page

narrative.summary: 從認證頁送出註冊
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.AuthPage.Ready 觸發 submitRegister，導航到 AuthFeature 並進入 feature.AuthFeature.Init。

validations.description: registration request is sent exactly once per submit action
loading state is shown during the request
the UI does not allow the user to self-assign admin role

narrative.summary: 載入公開活動清單
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.Init 觸發 loadVisibleActivities，讓頁面進入 page.ActivityListPage.Ready 並呈現可見活動。

validations.description: list API returns only published or full activities
each card shows title date location current registrations and capacity
status text is rendered as 可報名 已報名 or 額滿 according to current user state

narrative.summary: 從活動列表開啟活動詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.Ready 觸發 openActivity，導航到 /activities/:activityId 並進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.Init。

validations.description: selected activity id is used in navigation and detail request
the target route matches the clicked activity
the same activity card does not render duplicate open-detail actions

narrative.summary: 從活動列表切換到會員操作視角
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.Ready 觸發 openMemberActions，導航到 ActivityListPage.Member 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.member.Init。

validations.description: authenticated member-capable view exposes My Activities entry and registered-state labels
guest view does not expose member-only navigation

narrative.summary: 從活動列表切換到管理員操作視角
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.Ready 觸發 openAdminActions，導航到 ActivityListPage.Admin 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.admin.Init。

validations.description: admin-capable view exposes Admin Panel entry
member accounts do not see admin-only navigation in the same activities list layout

narrative.summary: ActivityListPage 與 Member delta 圖存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_activity_list 與 page_activity_list_member 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: ActivityListPage 與 Admin delta 圖存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_activity_list 與 page_activity_list_admin 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: 載入活動詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityDetailPage.Init 觸發 loadActivity，讓頁面進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.Ready 並顯示活動內容。

validations.description: detail API returns 200 for an existing visible activity
UI renders title description date location deadline capacity and status
only one CTA area is shown on the page

narrative.summary: 處理不存在的活動
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityDetailPage.Init 觸發 loadMissingActivity，讓頁面進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.NotFound 並顯示找不到活動。

validations.description: detail API returns 404 for a missing activity
not-found message is shown
register or cancel controls are not rendered

narrative.summary: 從活動詳情返回活動列表
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityDetailPage.Ready 觸發 backToList，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation returns to the activities list route successfully
public activity visibility rules remain based on published or full status
no stale detail-only action remains visible

narrative.summary: 未登入報名時導向認證頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityDetailPage.Ready 觸發 requireLoginForRegistration，導航到 /auth 並進入 page.AuthPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated registration attempt is redirected to auth or receives 401
return target preserves the current activity detail route
no registration row is created

narrative.summary: 開啟已登入使用者的詳情操作視角
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityDetailPage.Ready 觸發 openMemberDetailActions，導航到 ActivityDetailPage.Member 並進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.member.Init。

validations.description: authenticated member-capable detail view shows exactly one applicable state among register cancel or full indicator
unavailable actions stay hidden according to status deadline event date and current registration

narrative.summary: ActivityDetailPage 與 Member delta 圖存在階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_activity_detail 與 page_activity_detail_member 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: 載入我的活動
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.MyActivitiesPage.Init 觸發 loadRegisteredActivities，讓頁面進入 page.MyActivitiesPage.Ready 並顯示目前使用者已報名活動。

validations.description: my-activities API returns only the current user's active registrations
items are sorted by activity date
each item shows 即將開始 or 已結束 according to activity date

narrative.summary: 處理未登入存取我的活動
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.MyActivitiesPage.Init 觸發 accessWithoutLogin，讓頁面進入 page.MyActivitiesPage.Forbidden 並阻擋資料顯示。

validations.description: unauthenticated access is redirected to auth or returns 401
registered activity data is not rendered
return target for /my-activities is preserved

narrative.summary: 從我的活動開啟活動詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.MyActivitiesPage.Ready 觸發 openRegisteredActivity，導航到 /activities/:activityId 並進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.Init。

validations.description: selected registered activity opens the matching detail route
current activity id is preserved
registration status remains consistent with the user's registration record

narrative.summary: 從我的活動返回活動列表
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.MyActivitiesPage.Ready 觸發 backToActivities，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation returns to the activities list route
member-specific registration list is not leaked into the public list view
public visibility rules stay unchanged

narrative.summary: 未登入時從我的活動導向認證頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.MyActivitiesPage.Forbidden 觸發 goToAuth，導航到 /auth 並進入 page.AuthPage.Init。

validations.description: auth onboarding opens with return target /my-activities
guest navigation remains active
member-only or admin-only actions are still hidden before login

narrative.summary: 載入管理後台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.AdminPanelPage.Init 觸發 loadAdminPanel，讓頁面進入 page.AdminPanelPage.Ready 並顯示管理功能。

validations.description: admin request returns 200
management UI shows activity CRUD manual close registration registration list and CSV export actions
these controls are visible only to admin

narrative.summary: 阻擋非管理員存取後台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.AdminPanelPage.Init 觸發 accessWithoutAdmin，讓頁面進入 page.AdminPanelPage.Forbidden 並隱藏管理資料。

validations.description: non-admin access returns 403
admin management data is hidden
no create edit close archive or export action can be executed

narrative.summary: 從管理後台開啟活動管理流程
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.AdminPanelPage.Ready 觸發 openActivityManagement，導航到 ActivityManagementFeature 並進入 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Init。

validations.description: activity management workflow opens from admin panel with blank draft or selected activity context
only one editor entry is exposed for the requested action

narrative.summary: 從管理後台開啟報名名單流程
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.AdminPanelPage.Ready 觸發 openRegistrationList，導航到 RegistrationListFeature 並進入 feature.RegistrationListFeature.Init。

validations.description: registration list workflow opens for the selected activity
requested activity id is preserved
only admin identity can access the underlying registration data

narrative.summary: 從管理後台返回活動列表
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.AdminPanelPage.Ready 觸發 backToActivities，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: leaving admin panel returns to the public activities list route
admin-only panel content is no longer displayed
public list data remains limited to published or full activities

narrative.summary: 權限不足時從後台返回活動列表
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.AdminPanelPage.Forbidden 觸發 backToActivities，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: forbidden admin access returns the user to activities list
403-only state is cleared
public route remains accessible according to current identity

narrative.summary: 顯示會員相關操作
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.member.Init 觸發 showMemberActions，讓角色視角進入 page.ActivityListPage.member.Ready 並呈現會員可用操作。

validations.description: My Activities entry is visible
registered badge is shown for activities already joined by the current user
guest-only prompts are absent

narrative.summary: 從會員活動列表前往我的活動
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.member.Ready 觸發 openMyActivities，導航到 /my-activities 並進入 page.MyActivitiesPage.Init。

validations.description: authenticated user reaches only their own registrations page
no other user's registrations appear
navigation target matches the member CTA

narrative.summary: 從會員視角返回活動列表基底圖
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.member.Ready 觸發 returnToBase，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to the base activities list preserves public activity visibility rules
does not render duplicate member-only CTA on the page

narrative.summary: 顯示管理員相關操作
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.admin.Init 觸發 showAdminActions，讓角色視角進入 page.ActivityListPage.admin.Ready 並呈現管理員可用操作。

validations.description: Admin Panel entry is visible together with public activity content
admin-only controls do not appear for member identities

narrative.summary: 從管理員視角前往後台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.admin.Ready 觸發 openAdminPanel，導航到 /admin 並進入 page.AdminPanelPage.Init。

validations.description: admin route opens successfully for admin identity
admin panel returns 200
management actions become available only in this role-specific branch

narrative.summary: 從管理員視角返回活動列表基底圖
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityListPage.admin.Ready 觸發 returnToBase，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to the base activities list keeps public cards intact
removes admin-only action emphasis from the current view

narrative.summary: 顯示可用的報名操作
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityDetailPage.member.Init 觸發 showAvailableRegistrationAction，讓角色視角進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.member.Ready 並呈現唯一可用操作。

validations.description: exactly one applicable control is shown among register cancel registration or full indicator according to status deadline activity date and current registration record

narrative.summary: 從詳情視角發起報名
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityDetailPage.member.Ready 觸發 clickRegister，導航到 RegistrationFeature 並進入 feature.RegistrationFeature.Init。

validations.description: register action is available only when activity status is published
deadline has not passed and event has not ended
the current user has no active registration for the same activity

narrative.summary: 從詳情視角發起取消報名
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityDetailPage.member.Ready 觸發 clickCancelRegistration，導航到 RegistrationFeature 並進入 feature.RegistrationFeature.Init。

validations.description: cancel action is available only when the current user has an active registration
both deadline and activity date still allow cancellation
hidden otherwise

narrative.summary: 從詳情角色視角返回基底詳情圖
narrative.taskDescription: 在 page.ActivityDetailPage.member.Ready 觸發 returnToBase，導航到 /activities/:activityId 並進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to the base detail page preserves the same activity id
detail data stays consistent
no duplicate registration CTA is rendered

narrative.summary: 提交登入請求
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.Init 觸發 submitLogin，讓流程進入 feature.AuthFeature.SubmittingLogin。

validations.description: login request is sent exactly once
loading indicator is shown during submission
duplicate submit is blocked until the response completes

narrative.summary: 提交註冊請求
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.Init 觸發 submitRegister，讓流程進入 feature.AuthFeature.SubmittingRegister。

validations.description: registration request is sent exactly once
loading indicator is shown during submission
the request path does not allow assigning admin role from the client

narrative.summary: 登入成功並取得會員身分
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.SubmittingLogin 觸發 loginSucceededMember，讓流程進入 feature.AuthFeature.MemberDone。

validations.description: auth API returns 200 with member identity
token or session is stored successfully
member-only routes become accessible after completion

narrative.summary: 登入成功並取得管理員身分
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.SubmittingLogin 觸發 loginSucceededAdmin，讓流程進入 feature.AuthFeature.AdminDone。

validations.description: auth API returns 200 with admin identity
token or session is stored successfully
admin-only routes become accessible after completion

narrative.summary: 登入失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.SubmittingLogin 觸發 loginFailed，讓流程進入 feature.AuthFeature.Failed。

validations.description: auth API returns 401
token or session is not created
error prompt is shown
submit control becomes available again for retry

narrative.summary: 註冊成功並建立會員身分
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.SubmittingRegister 觸發 registerSucceeded，讓流程進入 feature.AuthFeature.MemberDone。

validations.description: account creation completes successfully
resulting identity is member rather than admin
authenticated state is established for post-register navigation

narrative.summary: 認證失敗後回到認證頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.Failed 觸發 retryAuth，導航到 /auth 並進入 page.AuthPage.Init。

validations.description: auth page reopens for another attempt
protected content is still hidden
no stale authenticated navigation item appears before successful authentication

narrative.summary: 會員認證成功後導向活動列表
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.MemberDone 觸發 authSucceededToActivities，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: member landing opens the activities list with authenticated UI
My Activities entry becomes visible
public activity visibility remains limited to published or full

narrative.summary: 會員認證成功後返回我的活動
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.MemberDone 觸發 authSucceededReturnMyActivities，導航到 /my-activities 並進入 page.MyActivitiesPage.Init。

validations.description: protected member route opens after successful auth
only current user's registrations are returned
return target is cleared after navigation completes

narrative.summary: 會員認證成功後返回活動詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.MemberDone 觸發 authSucceededReturnActivityDetail，導航到 /activities/:activityId 並進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.Init。

validations.description: original activity detail route is reopened after successful auth
current activity id is preserved
member-capable registration CTA can now be evaluated against current registration state

narrative.summary: 管理員認證成功後返回後台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.AdminDone 觸發 authSucceededReturnAdminPanel，導航到 /admin 並進入 page.AdminPanelPage.Init。

validations.description: protected admin route opens after successful auth
admin panel returns 200
admin mutation controls are visible only for admin identity

narrative.summary: 管理員認證成功後導向活動列表
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.AuthFeature.AdminDone 觸發 authSucceededToActivities，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: authenticated admin can also land on the public activities list
Admin Panel entry becomes visible
public activity visibility still remains limited to published or full

narrative.summary: 提交報名請求
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.Init 觸發 submitRegistration，讓流程進入 feature.RegistrationFeature.SubmittingRegister。

validations.description: registration API request is sent exactly once
duplicate click is blocked during submission
request includes current user and activity identifiers

narrative.summary: 提交取消報名請求
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.Init 觸發 submitCancellation，讓流程進入 feature.RegistrationFeature.SubmittingCancel。

validations.description: cancellation API request is sent exactly once
duplicate click is blocked during submission
request targets the current user's active registration for the activity

narrative.summary: 報名成功
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.SubmittingRegister 觸發 registerSucceeded，讓流程進入 feature.RegistrationFeature.Registered。

validations.description: registration API returns 200
transaction or atomic operation prevents oversell
exactly one active registration exists per user and activity
current registrations count increments by one
activity status switches to full immediately when count reaches capacity

narrative.summary: 報名被拒絕
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.SubmittingRegister 觸發 registerRejected，讓流程進入 feature.RegistrationFeature.Blocked。

validations.description: registration is rejected when activity status is not published
capacity is already full deadline has passed activity date has passed or duplicate active registration exists
current registrations count does not change

narrative.summary: 取消報名成功
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.SubmittingCancel 觸發 cancelSucceeded，讓流程進入 feature.RegistrationFeature.Canceled。

validations.description: cancellation API returns 200
target registration receives canceled_at
current registrations count decrements by one
activity status returns from full to published when capacity becomes available

narrative.summary: 取消報名被拒絕
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.SubmittingCancel 觸發 cancelRejected，讓流程進入 feature.RegistrationFeature.Blocked。

validations.description: cancellation is rejected when no active registration exists deadline has passed or activity date has passed
current registrations count plus activity status stay unchanged

narrative.summary: 報名成功後返回活動詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.Registered 觸發 returnToDetailAfterRegister，導航到 /activities/:activityId 並進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.Init。

validations.description: detail page reloads the same activity
CTA changes from register to cancel or full indicator according to latest status
displayed count matches persisted registration data

narrative.summary: 報名成功後同步回活動列表
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.Registered 觸發 syncListAfterRegister，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: activities list reflects updated registration badge and current registrations count for the same activity
no duplicate active registration is shown for the current user

narrative.summary: 取消報名成功後返回活動詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.Canceled 觸發 returnToDetailAfterCancel，導航到 /activities/:activityId 並進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.Init。

validations.description: detail page reloads the same activity
cancel CTA disappears and register CTA reappears only when status is published and time rules still allow it
displayed count matches persisted data

narrative.summary: 取消報名成功後同步回活動列表
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.Canceled 觸發 syncListAfterCancel，導航到 /activities 並進入 page.ActivityListPage.Init。

validations.description: activities list reflects released capacity
registered badge is removed for the canceled activity
public visibility still depends only on published or full status

narrative.summary: 報名流程受阻後返回活動詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationFeature.Blocked 觸發 returnToDetailWithCurrentState，導航到 /activities/:activityId 並進入 page.ActivityDetailPage.Init。

validations.description: detail page shows unchanged registration availability state
no extra registration row is created or canceled
count plus activity status remain consistent with server data

narrative.summary: 建立或更新草稿
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Init 觸發 createOrUpdateDraft，讓流程進入 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.DraftSaved。

validations.description: draft save API returns 200
title description date location deadline capacity and status fields are persisted
date is later than deadline and capacity is a positive integer
create or update operation is recorded in the audit log

narrative.summary: 發佈活動
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.DraftSaved 觸發 publishActivity，讓流程進入 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Published。

validations.description: publish API returns 200
activity status becomes published
the activity appears in the public list with title date location current registrations and capacity

narrative.summary: 活動額滿
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Published 觸發 reachCapacity，讓流程進入 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Full。

validations.description: current registrations count equals capacity
activity status changes automatically to full
both list and detail views stop offering register action

narrative.summary: 釋出名額後恢復可報名
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Full 觸發 capacityReleased，讓流程回到 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Published。

validations.description: after a valid cancellation releases one slot activity status returns to published
list and detail views allow registration again
counts stay consistent

narrative.summary: 從已發佈狀態關閉報名
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Published 觸發 closeRegistration，讓流程進入 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Closed。

validations.description: close action API returns 200
activity status becomes closed
new registration requests are rejected and existing registration records remain queryable to admin

narrative.summary: 從額滿狀態關閉報名
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Full 觸發 closeRegistration，讓流程進入 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Closed。

validations.description: close action API returns 200 from full state
activity status becomes closed
new registration requests remain rejected and current registrations count is unchanged by the status change

narrative.summary: 封存已關閉活動
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Closed 觸發 archiveActivity，讓流程進入 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Archived。

validations.description: archive API returns 200
activity status becomes archived
the activity is removed from the public activities list

narrative.summary: 封存草稿活動
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.DraftSaved 觸發 archiveActivity，讓流程進入 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Archived。

validations.description: archive API returns 200 for a draft activity
the activity stays hidden from the public list
admin audit history still records the archive action

narrative.summary: 草稿儲存後返回後台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.DraftSaved 觸發 returnToAdminPanel，導航到 /admin 並進入 page.AdminPanelPage.Init。

validations.description: admin panel reloads with the draft activity visible only in admin management data
the public activities list still excludes the draft activity

narrative.summary: 活動發佈後返回後台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Published 觸發 returnToAdminPanel，導航到 /admin 並進入 page.AdminPanelPage.Init。

validations.description: admin panel reloads with updated published status visible in management data
admin-only controls remain available to the same admin identity

narrative.summary: 報名關閉後返回後台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Closed 觸發 returnToAdminPanel，導航到 /admin 並進入 page.AdminPanelPage.Init。

validations.description: admin panel reloads with closed status shown in management data
further registration-close action is no longer offered for the same activity

narrative.summary: 活動封存後返回後台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.ActivityManagementFeature.Archived 觸發 returnToAdminPanel，導航到 /admin 並進入 page.AdminPanelPage.Init。

validations.description: admin panel reloads with archived status reflected in management data
the public activities list no longer contains the activity

narrative.summary: 載入報名名單
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationListFeature.Init 觸發 loadRegistrations，讓流程進入 feature.RegistrationListFeature.Ready。

validations.description: registrations API returns 200
rows include name email and registration time for the selected activity only
no unrelated activity registrations are included

narrative.summary: 匯出 CSV
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationListFeature.Ready 觸發 exportCsv，讓流程進入 feature.RegistrationListFeature.Exporting。

validations.description: export request is sent for the selected activity only
CSV generation starts from an admin-only action
exported data source matches the currently viewed registration list

narrative.summary: CSV 匯出完成
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationListFeature.Exporting 觸發 exportCompleted，讓流程回到 feature.RegistrationListFeature.Ready。

validations.description: CSV file is generated successfully
exported columns include name email and registration time
exported row count matches the current registration list for the activity

narrative.summary: 從報名名單返回後台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 feature.RegistrationListFeature.Ready 觸發 backToAdminPanel，導航到 /admin 並進入 page.AdminPanelPage.Init。

validations.description: admin panel route reloads successfully
selected activity management context remains available for further actions
registration list data is no longer shown outside admin context

warnings: ActivityListPage has overlapping role coverage because ActivityListPage.Member applies to member and admin while ActivityListPage.Admin also applies to admin; variant.deltaDiagramIdsByRole keeps the admin-specific delta as the primary admin mapping.
